name: Hunan Sokan New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Sokan New Materials Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells coating materials for consumer electronics, automobiles, and other high-end consumer goods in China. The company offers a series of silicone feel paints, 3D glass photosensitive inks, PVD series of coatings, UV series of colored paints, and series of waterborne coatings technology and products. It also provides automotive anti fog resins and paints, as well as automotive parts PVD coating technology and products. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Ningxiang, China.
